class.name: FmodAudioEffectAmplify
class.brief_description: A simple gain/volume effect for amplifying or attenuating audio signals.
class.description: FmodAudioEffectAmplify is a basic gain control effect that increases or decreases the volume of the audio signal. It provides both decibel (dB) and linear control over the amplification level. Use this effect for simple volume adjustments, boosting quiet signals, or attenuating loud signals in your audio pipeline.

members.member: The amplification level in decibels (dB). Range: -80 dB to +24 dB. Default value of 0 dB means no change to the signal. Negative values attenuate the signal, positive values amplify it.

The amplification level as a linear value. Range: 0.0 to 4.0 (approximate). A value of 1.0 means unity gain (no change), values below 1.0 attenuate, and values above 1.0 amplify. This is automatically converted to/from [member volume_db].
